prompt:
Unique, collectible NFT character in bold cartoon style. 
Background: Faint thunder glow illuminates rooftop edge. 
Head: Cone-shaped head like an upside-down traffic cone. 
Eyes: Eyes shaped in spirals of divine geometry, glowing gold.. 
Clothing: Fragmented jacket pieces glowing with internal light. 
Color: Urban blue tone. 
Species: Mascot. 
Only visible text: 'VERT'. 
Bold outlines, cel-shading, flat colors, no gradients, no photorealism.
